## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss SOW details and next steps for GrowthX's engagement with Diligent](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Diligent wants to start with a smaller scope and rework the SOW after GrowthX meets with their content team](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [CMS limitations are a current bottleneck for content production at Diligent](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Focus areas will be governance funnel and risk/audit top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Aiming for end of May start date, pending vendor agreement and team alignment](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Challenges

  - [Diligent has a 7-person content team but lacks clear strategy and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Losing organic search traffic and relying more on ad spend](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [CMS limitations slowing down page creation (1-2 week turnaround vs desired 24 hours)](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
  - [Existing agency sending backlinks to unknown pages](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)

### Revised Engagement Scope

  - [Start with smaller scope, focusing on governance and risk/audit content](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [Remove custom imagery and CMS integration from initial SOW](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Aim for 12-month engagement with potential to expand](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Reduce monthly spend initially to show growth before increasing budget](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

### GrowthX Capabilities Overview

  - [Detailed explanation of content strategy approach using Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Process for identifying content opportunities and refreshing existing content](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Typical output closer to 15 articles per week at 100,000 words](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule meeting with Diligent content team (Friday 8-9am PT or following Tuesday)](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
  - [GrowthX to review vendor agreement from Diligent](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
  - [Diligent to introduce GrowthX to procurement contacts (Olivia and Stavos)](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Rework SOW after content team meeting](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Aim for end of May start date, pending agreement and team alignment](https://fathom.video/share/kyHvcbUxPqs3h9AH2rB_8vCk3zmXSV-w?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
